title: How To Design a Complete Brand Identity With AI (Best AI Logo Maker)
summary: Design.com is a tool for generating complete brand identities including AI logos, brand kits, and marketing collateral in under 20 minutes. The platform uses plain-English editing and auto-applies brand guidelines across 500,000+ templates including business cards, social posts, and animated logos.
writeup: This sponsored tutorial walks through Design.com, an AI platform for producing full brand identities: logos, brand kits, business cards, and social media templates. The creator builds three example brand identities, each in under 20 minutes, using AI logo generation, natural language editing, and automatic template application across a library of more than 500,000 templates. The demonstration also covers background removal as part of the workflow. The takeaway is a concrete look at how agentic editing and template application compress brand design into a short, repeatable process.
